title: Notices sent to four ex-MLAs for defying AIADMK whip during trust vote in Tamil Nadu Assembly
description: Notices were issued by the Assembly Secretariat to S. Jayakumar, P. Sathyabama, Maragatham Kumaravel, and Esaki Subaya, who were among the 25 rebel AIADMK MLAs who voted in favour of the TVK-led government and later resigned from their posts as legislators and joined the TVK
